opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have zero energy, my body feels like it is wasting away, and my mood is so dark I cannot function anymore.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It has been building for months but tonight I hit a wall and broke down — my wife made the call because she is worried about me.

symptom_narrative.onset: crept up slowly over about the past year
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly a year, and it feels worse the last few weeks
symptom_narrative.character: no energy at all, feeling flat and low, and I have basically lost all interest in sex; I feel physically weaker and smaller than I used to be
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: tonight it got so bad I couldn't get out of bed and I just broke down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's my whole body and my mood, not one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time now, worst first thing in the morning when I have no drive to do anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I have tried seems to help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps grinding me down on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed I don't wake up with morning erections anymore and I'm shaving a lot less often than I used to
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — I've always been fairly fit and driven
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically confined to bed, I can't work or do anything around the house, and it's putting my marriage under huge strain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: married, spouse is very worried and supportive and is with me right now; the strain of how I've been is really affecting us both

communication_style.typical_message_style: low, flat, self-critical; the spouse prompts and fills in gaps

objective_data_offered.value: about 84 kg on our bathroom scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-weighed on a home scale, not calibrated
